meta.title: Yates Travel | Crafting Unforgettable Adventures
meta.description: Yates Travel is a personal travel agency led by Brian Yates. Cruises, all-inclusive resorts, Disney vacations and custom itineraries, all planned for you, stress-free and at no extra cost.

hero.title: Crafting unforgettable adventures
hero.subtitle: From dream cruises to all-inclusive beach escapes, Brian Yates plans every detail of your trip so all you have to do is enjoy it.
hero.highlight3: Support before, during & after your trip
hero.imageAlt: Turquoise sea and white sand beach at sunset

partners.title: Trips with brands you know and love
partners.subtitle: Bookings with trusted cruise lines and resorts, plus special service member rates.

services.title: What we do for you
services.subtitle: One person who takes care of everything: quotes, bookings, documents and tips, with the attention a big website will never give you.

cruises.title: Cruises
cruises.description: Caribbean, Bahamas, Virgin Voyages and more. We find the right ship, cabin and route for your style and budget.

resorts.title: All-inclusive resorts
resorts.description: Sandals, Beaches and other beach resorts where everything is included. Ideal for couples, families and honeymoons.

disney.title: Disney vacations
disney.description: Parks, hotels and Disney cruises planned to make the most of every magical day, for kids and grown-ups alike.

custom.title: Custom itineraries
custom.description: Tell us your dream trip and we build it from scratch: flights, hotels, transfers and experiences tailored just for you.

military.title: Service member rates
military.description: Special rates and honest guidance for military members, veterans and their families.

groups.title: Group & family travel
groups.description: Weddings, anniversaries, friends' getaways: we organize group travel so everyone arrives happy and together.

destinations.title: Popular destinations to inspire you
destinations.subtitle: A few of the places travelers ask us about the most. Don't see yours? We plan trips anywhere in the world.

steps.title: Planning your trip is easy
steps.subtitle: Three simple steps between you and your next adventure.

step1.title: Tell us your dream
step1.description: Get in touch and tell us where you want to go, with whom, when and your budget.

step2.title: We craft your trip
step2.description: Brian researches the best options and sends you a clear proposal, with no obligation.

step3.title: Travel worry-free
step3.description: We handle bookings and stay by your side before, during and after the trip.

about.title: Meet Brian Yates
about.p1: Yates Travel was born from a simple idea: planning a trip should be as enjoyable as the trip itself. Brian takes the time to understand what you want, handles every detail and treats your vacation as if it were his own.
about.p2: Based in Arkansas and serving travelers everywhere, Brian specializes in cruises, all-inclusive resorts and Disney vacations, working with brands like Virgin Voyages, Sandals, Beaches and Disney Travel.
about.point1: Direct, personal attention whenever you need it
about.point2: Stress-free planning from first quote to your flight home
about.point3: Real support if anything changes along the way
about.imageAlt: Brian Yates, founder of Yates Travel, sitting in front of a fountain

r1.name: Lori Taylor-Dixon
r1.text: My experience with Brian booking my cruise was excellent. He catered to all my wants and needs. I enjoyed the experience stress free from any complications. I will use his agency again.

r2.name: Rose Turner
r2.text: My experience with Brian was very pleasant and resourceful. He made sure to give me his full attention when making sure my experience was stress free. I would book with him anytime.

r3.name: Amy Rayne
r3.text: Friendly, professional, and clearly cares about helping people plan great travel experiences. Definitely worth reaching out to if you're looking for help with a trip.

r4.name: Ronald Perry Jr
r4.text: Brian did a phenomenal job for my cruise this year. I would highly recommend him.

r5.name: Nancy Martin
r5.text: Brian at Yates Travel is amazing. He took care of our vacation needs so we wouldn't have to worry about anything. I would highly recommend him to anyone.

contact.title: Let's plan your next trip
contact.subtitle: Send a message and Brian will get back to you with ideas and a no-obligation quote.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us where you'd like to go, when, and with how many people…

info.title: Or reach out directly

footer.tagline: Personal travel planning: cruises, resorts, Disney and custom itineraries.
